items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of a custom reminder schedule for the persona scenario. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate the functionality of the reminder schedule or its outcomes. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
